entity.label: Ammihud
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Omri, and the father of Uthai (1 Chr. 9:4).

nodes.label: Ammihud
nodes.description: The son of Omri, and the father of Uthai (1 Chr. 9:4).

verses.text: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pharez the son of Judah.
